---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
excludeAgent: "code-review"
---

## Documentation Instructions
- Keep docs actionable and task-oriented.
- Use short sections and concrete command examples.
- Ensure commands are copy-paste ready and match repository tooling.
- Update docs in the same change set when behavior or setup changes.
- Avoid marketing language in technical docs.
- Use consistent terms for components, services, and directories.
